race.comment: TEL AVIV (5) goes on top. She's racing quite well having belted what was the main danger OLLANDIA BEACH when they met. That horse scratches and leaves TEL AVIV very well placed. She was just fair at Sale last time but this won't take as much winning and her best form holds up well. PICK WISELY (6) is stuck on the 1 win from 13 starts but doesn't mind a runner-up finish having just missed for the fifth time two back at Kilmore. He should be thereabouts again. ROOKERY NOOK (4) is the only last-start winner in the field, off a smart synthetic maiden victory. He can measure up. MICKIO (3) contested a stronger race at Bendigo last time and this looks a better spot for him, respecting.
